tweets.text: Fed research shows that hedge funds’ Treasury exposure has doubled since 2023, with the cash-futures basis trade now accounting for about $830 billion. The research warned that the combination of high leverage and concentrated positions could amplify systemic risks during periods of market stress.

tweets.text:
Despite headlines to the contrary, households across income cohorts have seen a rise in their savings and checking deposit balances since the start of this year, according to Bank of America deposit data. The percentage increase has been particularly pronounced among lower-income households due to larger tax refunds. 
@thedailyshot
